subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast quaffed the sealed Wine, wherefrom all others turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی طوبی لک بما شربت الرحیق المختوم اذ اعرض عنه کل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @living waters; water of life
